name: GLM-4V-9B
license: GLM-4 License (custom, free for research & most commercial use)
archDisplay: Dense transformer + ViT vision encoder (GLM-4V, CogVLM-style)
note: Open multimodal GLM-4 variant adding 1120x1120 Chinese/English image understanding; claimed to beat GPT-4-turbo-2024-04-09, Gemini 1.0 Pro, Qwen-VL-Max and Claude 3 Opus on multimodal benchmarks.

results.notes: Labeled 'SEEDBench_IMG' on the official model card (SEED-Bench image subset).
From the official model card's multimodal benchmark comparison table.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, same 2024-06-05 release batch as GLM-4-9B-Chat (GitHub README_20240605.md). Notably the paramsB:14 in the source record (despite the '9B' model name) is CORRECT — verified via HF API safetensors metadata showing 13,906,320,928 total params (13.9B, rounds to 14) because of the added ViT vision encoder. config.json seq_length=8192 confirms 8K context (matches ctxK:8, unusually short vs the text-only 9B's 128K). All 4 result rows (MMBench-EN 81.1, MMBench-CN 79.4, AI2D 81.1, OCRBench 786) re-confirmed verbatim on the HF README. No changes made.
